name: Old Fashioned Ice Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the eggs until very light.
2. Gradually add the sugar and salt, beating the mixture well.
3. Add the cream and vanilla.
4. Add the milk last.
5. Pour into an ice cream freezer and allow to swell by about 2 1/2 inches in the freezer.
6. Freeze using a dasher-type old-fashioned ice cream freezer.
Makes 1 gallon of delicious vanilla ice cream.
